{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aetheric magic
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Traditional [[Aetheric magic]] cannot be used by enemies to break contracts in the same way a [[Zenith Device]] might.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c19">''The Pilot'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
